title: brachystegia boehmii var. katangensis
intro: Brachystegia boehmii var. katangensis, also known as the Katanga Julbernardia or Katanga Brachystegia, is a plant species within the Caesalpinioideae subfamily of the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brachystegia boehmii var. katangensis include relief from fever, pain, and respiratory issues, as well as protection against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses.
